path.description: The path to a working directory of a local repository.

tag.description: The tag to create in the repository.

signer.description: Optional signer information for the tag. If provided, this takes precedence over both system-level defaults and any optional, default authorship information configured in the `git-clone` step.

email.description: The email of the signer. If not provided, the email 'no-reply@kargo.io' will be used.

name.description: The name of the signer. If not provided, the name 'Kargo' will be used.

signingKey.description: The GPG signing key for the signer.

signingMessage.description: The message to include when signing the tag.
